entry.title: IDC HT940214D0003 (P00200) awarded to WISCONSIN PHYSICIANS SERVICE INSURANCE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TRICARE DUAL-ELIGIBLE FISCAL INTERMEDIARY CONTRACT (TDEFIC) PROVIDES CLAIMS PROCESSING AND ASSOCIATED CUSTOMER SUPPORT SERVICES.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: THIRD PARTY ADMINISTRATION OF INSURANCE AND PENSION FUNDS
